headline: Is AvalonBay Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: AvalonBay stock has trailed behind the S&P 500’s returns over the past year, but analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock.

headline: AvalonBay (AVB) Could Benefit From a Changing Housing Market, Says Mizuho
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 2.82%, AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE:AVB) is among the 7 Best “Land Owner” Stocks to Buy for Hard Asset Value. On June 10, Mizuho raised its price target on AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE:AVB) to $192 from $189 while maintaining a Neutral rating. The firm updated its outlook for apartment real […]
